question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks no didactic questions of the user. It delivers a complete solution with explanation, then only responds to the user's questions. No teachable moments are surfaced as prompts.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are framed by the Pair. The error-message digression is informative but presented as exposition, not as a choice for the user to reason through.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full solution is shown immediately with all reasoning revealed. No progression of difficulty or guided discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanations are well-organized, but the dynamic is monologue-driven rather than a back-and-forth dialogue. The error-message tangent is genuinely interesting but user-led, not Pair-led.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code is identical to baseline and passes a more thorough self-test. Solves the problem correctly and idiomatically.

friction.rationale: Two turns and ~50s, comparable to baseline's 35s. Slightly longer prose but the error-message contract discussion adds modest value.
